last_prompt: Implement the API token cost-tracking system designed in ideas-api-cost-tracking. Create cli/src/cost_tracker.rs with a CostTracker struct holding per-task and cumulative token counts and a method to compute estimated_cost_usd given a model name. Extend the agent response handling in cli/src/agent.rs to capture the usage object from OpenAI-compatible API responses and update the tracker. Add `max_cost_usd: Option<f64>` to Config in cli/src/types.rs (default None, skip_serializing_if None). In cli/src/ralph_loop.rs, check the cumulative cost after each task and abort the loop with a clear message if max_cost_usd is exceeded. Add a `--max-cost <USD>` CLI flag in cli/src/cli.rs. Print a cost summary (total tokens + estimated USD) at the end of each iteration and at run completion.
